entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shift in temperatures and weather patterns threatening agriculture and food systems)

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: Country in West Africa where the study was conducted)

entities.name: CLIMATE-SMART AGRICULTURE
entities.description: An integrated approach to managing landscapes to address food security and climate change)

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers managing small plots of land, the primary subjects of the study)

entities.name: KOUMPENTUM
entities.description: Specific region in Senegal where the study took place)

entities.name: MULTISTAGE RANDOM SAMPLING
entities.description: Sampling technique used to select 270 smallholder farmers)

entities.name: STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRES
entities.description: Tool used to collect data from the interviewed farmers)

entities.name: CROP ROTATION
entities.description: A CSA practice involving growing different crops in succession on the same land)

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD SIZE
entities.description: The number of people living in a farmer's household, influencing CSA adoption)

entities.name: PERCEIVED CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: The farmer's awareness and perception of climate change impacts)

entities.name: ACCESS TO CLIMATE ADVISORY INFORMATION
entities.description: Availability of information regarding climate trends and adaptation strategies)

entities.name: CONSERVATION TILLAGE
entities.description: A CSA practice that minimizes soil disturbance to improve soil health)

entities.name: FARMER'S EXPERIENCE
entities.description: The number of years a farmer has been practicing agriculture)

entities.name: FARMER EDUCATION
entities.description: The level of formal or informal schooling of the farmers)

entities.name: ACCESS TO CLIMATE ADVISORY SERVICES
entities.description: Availability of professional services providing climate-related guidance)

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: Process of developing and strengthening skills and abilities of farmers)

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of agricultural systems to recover from and adapt to climate-related shocks)

entities.name: FINANCING MECHANISMS
entities.description: Financial tools and systems to support the adoption of adaptation technologies)

entities.name: ADAPTATION TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies designed to help farmers adapt to climate change)
